title: JNVoice Mod
body:
JNVOICE Fabric is a Fabric voice/voice-chat mod that brings real-time communication into Minecraft. Great for SMP, roleplay, and co-op survival.

# **Features**

- 🎙️ In-game voice communication
- ⚙️ Lightweight and easy to use
- 🔁 Multiplayer-friendly (recommended on both server & client)

# **Installation**

1. Install Fabric Loader + Fabric API
2. Put the .jar into your mods folder
3. Launch the game
4. (Server) also place the .jar into the server mods folder

# **License: JNCOMPANY Custom License**

- ✅ Use on servers (including VIP)
- ✅ Modify/remake/compile for private use
- ❌ No reupload / redistribution (including modified builds)
- ❌ No selling / paywalling the mod/plugin
- ✅ Donations allowed (no paywalled features)

Official download: Modrinth page only (no reuploads).
